_status: LOCKED — reference image selected, use for all campaign shots

identity.name: Bea
identity.heritage: South Asian-American. Born and raised in the US. Reads as American woman
identity.persona_match: Mystery Symptom Maria — chronic symptoms, doctor dismissals, finally taking testing into her own hands

primary.description: Approximately 1cm wide, starting at left temple hairline, running back into the hair. Natural premature greying, NOT dyed or styled. High contrast against dark brown/black hair. Visible even in messy bun
primary.verification: CHECK: Is the grey streak visible at the left temple? If not, regenerate

secondary.description: 8mm long, slightly indented, horizontal. Childhood fall scar. Catches light differently — appears lighter/shinier than surrounding brown skin
secondary.verification: CHECK: Look for the chin scar. May be subtle in some angles. Acceptable if lighting doesn't catch it, but should be present in close-ups

tertiary.description: Left eyebrow is straighter and thinner. Right eyebrow has a noticeably higher arch. Creates a permanent subtle 'really?' micro-expression at rest
tertiary.verification: CHECK: Are the brows different shapes? Left straighter, right more arched? This is the hardest detail for models to maintain — always verify

physical_description.skin: Medium brown with warm golden undertones. Under-eye circles are darker brown (hyperpigmentation — melanin-based, NOT purple). Visible skin texture on forehead (tiny bumps, slight congestion). Pores visible on nose and inner cheeks. One faint dark spot on left cheek from old blemish
physical_description.lips: Naturally pigmented (deeper brownish-pink). Slightly dry with peeling at corners
physical_description.hair: Dark brown/black, thick, wavy natural texture. Long past shoulders. Default state: loose messy low bun falling apart — wispy pieces escaping around face, neck, and temples. Grey streak visible at left temple. Baby hairs at temples. Usually day-two hair, not freshly washed
physical_description.build: Average. Not notably thin or heavy. Relaxed posture, tends to slouch slightly when tired

default_styling.top: Faded black v-neck tee. Soft and thin from years of overwashing. Relaxed fit, slightly stretched neckline. The black has faded to charcoal. Small stain near hem

jewelry.nose: Gold nose stud, left nostril, tiny, barely noticeable. Catches light occasionally
jewelry.ears: MISMATCHED — left ear: small gold hoop (12mm diameter). Right ear: tiny gold stud. Always this configuration
jewelry.wrist: Black thin hair tie on right wrist, slightly stretched out

default_styling.no_makeup: Bea never wears makeup in ads. Her bare face IS the brand — real, unfiltered, relatable. No foundation, no concealer, no mascara, nothing

expression_asymmetry.notes: Right eyebrow lifts higher in surprise, skepticism, and processing. Left brow stays flatter. This creates natural asymmetry in ALL expressions
expression_asymmetry.smile_pattern: When she smiles, left side lifts slightly before right. Creates a subtle knowing/wry quality
expression_asymmetry.resting_face: The brow asymmetry gives her a permanent 'really?' quality at rest. Reads as intelligent and slightly skeptical — perfect for the 'tired of not getting answers' brand story

prompt_block._usage: Copy the avatar_reference_instruction below into ANY prompt that needs Bea. Attach her reference.jpg as the character reference image
prompt_block.avatar_reference_instruction: Subject is a 35-year-old American woman, South Asian-American heritage, medium brown skin with warm golden undertones. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: (1) distinctive white/grey streak starting at left temple, approximately 1cm wide, running back from hairline — very visible against dark hair, (2) small horizontal scar on chin, 8mm, slightly indented, catches light, (3) asymmetric eyebrows — left is straighter/thinner, right has higher arch. Hair is dark brown/black, thick, wavy, in a loose messy low bun with pieces escaping. Under-eye circles are brown hyperpigmentation. Gold nose stud left nostril. Mismatched earrings: left small gold hoop, right tiny gold stud. Black hair tie on right wrist. No makeup. Wearing faded black v-neck tee. MATCH THE ATTACHED REFERENCE IMAGE FOR FACE IDENTITY
